raw_consumer_statement:
To Whom It May Concern, I am writing to formally dispute an unauthorized charge in the amount of {$420.00} from XXXX XXXX that appears on my XXXX XXXXXXXX XXXX XXXX Credit Card ending in XXXX. I did not authorize or make this purchase. 

It has now been almost XXXX ( XXXX ) years, and despite my multiple attempts to resolve this matter, Citi has neither protected me as a consumer nor reimbursed the disputed funds. Additionally, Citi has failed to provide any proof of the alleged transaction or evidence of my authorization. 

I respectfully request that your office investigate this matter immediately and issue a full refund of the {$420.00}. 

Thank you for your time and cooperation. 

Sincerely, XXXX XXXX
